AAPL.title: Italy opens first DMA probe into Apple over iCloud access
AAPL.summary: Italy’s regulator examines whether Apple gives rival cloud providers equal access to iOS and iPadOS system features.

AAPL.title: Apple (AAPL) Faces Italy DMA Probe Over Cloud Interoperability
AAPL.summary: Italy’s competition authority has opened a Digital Markets Act probe into Apple’s cloud service interoperability on iOS and iPadOS. Regulators are examining whether Apple limits third party consumer cloud providers from using certain system features, potentially favoring iCloud. This is the first investigation launched by a national authority under the EU’s Digital Markets Act and focuses on how Apple’s ecosystem interacts with external services.
